Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Harbour appeared by telephone for Kathleen Kimura (Administrator).

Mr. Harbour stated that he has nothing to add, that he has no personal evidence to offer the Court and thanks the Court for its guidance. The Court granted the Amended Petition to Determine Entitlement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Anasse. Not reported.
